description: Q402 — gasless USDC, USDT, and RLUSD payments across 8 EVM chains, callable from any MCP client.
name: io.github.bitgett/q402-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Q402 API key from https://q402.quackai.ai/dashboard. q402_test_* keys keep the server in sandbox mode; q402_live_* keys are required for real on-chain transactions.
environmentVariables.name: Q402_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Hex-encoded EVM private key used to sign payment authorizations. Required only for real on-chain payments (live mode).
environmentVariables.name: Q402_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to allow real on-chain transactions. Any other value (or unset) keeps the server in sandbox mode regardless of API key tier.
environmentVariables.name: Q402_ENABLE_REAL_PAYMENTS

environmentVariables.description: Per-call USD-equivalent cap. Any q402_pay request with amount above this is rejected before signing.
environmentVariables.name: Q402_MAX_AMOUNT_PER_CALL

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated lowercase EVM addresses. When set, q402_pay rejects any recipient not on this allowlist.
environmentVariables.name: Q402_ALLOWED_RECIPIENTS

environmentVariables.description: Override for the Q402 relay endpoint. Defaults to https://q402.quackai.ai/api. Set explicitly when running against a self-hosted Q402 deployment or a non-canonical environment.
environmentVariables.name: Q402_RELAY_BASE_URL
